anchor:
- Senior Mobile Engineer (iOS & Android) – 5+ years full‑stack mobile development experience  
- Proficient in Swift, Objective‑C, Kotlin, and Java – hands‑on with dependency injection, MVVM, and reactive frameworks (RxSwift/RxJava, Combine, Coroutines)  
- Strong background in UI/UX principles, adaptive layouts, and performance optimization (profiling, memory leaks, power consumption)  
- Experience integrating RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and WebSocket services, including OTA updates and push notification systems  
- Proven track record delivering production apps on the App Store and Google Play with a 4.5+ rating  
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (Fastlane, Bitrise, GitHub Actions) and automated testing frameworks (XCTest, Espresso, Appium)  
- Ability to work in an Agile/Scrum environment, contribute to code reviews, and mentor junior developers  
- Comfortable collaborating across cross‑functional teams (product, design, QA, DevOps) in a fast‑moving startup culture  
- Remote‑first workstyle, based in the U.S. (any time zone acceptable) or willing to relocate to Austin, TX by Q1 2026  
- Full‑time (not C2C) contract preferred; start date: ASAP (within 2–3 weeks of offer)  
- AWS Certified Developer – Associate or equivalent cloud knowledge a plus  

---

positive.summary: Senior Mobile Engineer with 7 years of experience delivering high‑quality iOS and Android applications. Expert in Swift, Objective‑C, Kotlin, and Java, with deep knowledge of MVVM, DI, and reactive programming. Proven ability to optimize performance, integrate complex backend services, and lead mobile teams in a fast‑moving startup environment.

work_experience.description: Developed core features for the Talabat restaurant discovery app, focusing on adaptive layouts and performance optimization. Utilized MVVM architecture and reactive frameworks to streamline data flow. Automated testing with XCTest and Espresso and set up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.

Lead the mobile engineering team to deliver the Careem rider and driver apps, integrating GraphQL, REST, and WebSocket services. Implemented OTA updates, push notifications, and a robust CI/CD pipeline using Fastlane, Bitrise, and GitHub Actions. Mentored junior engineers and performed code reviews in an Agile sprint environment. Maintained app ratings above 4.7 on both the App Store and Google Play.

If you’re also comfortable with cloud IAM strategies (AWS, Azure AD) and have attended at least one SOC‑related blue‑print workshop, let’s talk—now’s the time to bring your expertise to our growth mission!

positive.summary: Senior penetration tester with 6.5 years of experience hardening SaaS platforms and cloud infrastructures, specialized in zero‑day exploitation and IAM security.

work_experience.description: Assisted senior testers in vulnerability assessments, web application pentests, and IAM configuration reviews.
Conducted red‑team exercises and exploited zero‑day vulnerabilities in web applications. Implemented SOC blue‑print workshops.
Lead pentest engagements for multi‑tenant SaaS, performed OWASP top‑10 assessments, and designed IAM hardening blueprints for AWS and Azure AD.

projects.name: ZeroDay Exploit Framework (ZDEF)
projects.description: Custom framework using Python and Metasploit to identify and exploit zero‑day CVEs in SaaS.

projects.name: IAM Hardening Automation
projects.description: Automated audit of AWS IAM policies and Azure AD permissions to enforce least privilege.

projects.name: SOC Blue‑Print Workshop Toolkit
projects.description: Toolkit to guide SOC teams in creating blue‑print response playbooks.

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure Security Engineer Associate

negative.summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years of production‑grade experience building web applications using React 18, Next.js 13.4 (App Router), and TypeScript 5.1. Skilled in creating component libraries with Tailwind 3.3, deploying edge‑enabled serverless APIs to Vercel, and implementing comprehensive testing suites with Jest, Cypress, and Cucumber. US resident ready to start within 2 weeks.

work_experience.description: Developed patient portal interface using React 17, Next.js 12, and TypeScript. Created reusable component library with Tailwind 3.0 and CSS Modules. Deployed to Netlify with a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline. Wrote unit tests with Jest and integrated end‑to‑end tests with Cypress.

Led front‑end engineering for Careem’s global mobile portal, delivering a scalable component library built with React 18, Next.js 13.4 App Router, TypeScript 5.1, and Tailwind 3.3. Implemented serverless edge APIs, React Query v5 data fetching, and comprehensive state management with Zustand and Redux Toolkit. Established CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions, Dockerized serverless functions, and deployed to Vercel. Authored unit tests with Jest and RTL, and E2E suites with Cypress 13 and BDD integration via Cucumber. Ensured WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility and responsive design across devices.

projects.name: EdgeUI
projects.description: Component library for edge‑enabled web apps, built with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind 3.3, and styled‑components. Includes automated style linting and comprehensive test suites.

projects.name: DrugFinder
projects.description: E‑commerce platform for pharmaceuticals using Next.js 13, React Query v5, SWR, and Zustand for state management.

projects.name: HealthPortal
projects.description: Patient portal for Vezeeta, featuring responsive UI, accessibility compliance, and end‑to‑end testing.

work_experience.description: Automated IAM policy management and enforced MFA across multi‑cloud environments. Implemented SAML and OIDC federated login for internal services and used Terraform to provision IAM resources.

Designed and implemented Zero‑Trust IAM solutions across AWS, Azure, and GCP using Terraform, Ansible, and Kubernetes RBAC. Integrated IAM with GitLab CI/CD pipelines and automated audit remediation with Prowler and Cloud Custodian.

projects.description: Built a platform enforcing least‑privilege IAM policies across AWS, Azure, and GCP, integrating Terraform, Ansible, and Kubernetes RBAC with automated audit remediation.
